name: PIONEER Legacy Credit Card

domestic: 1 complimentary visit per calendar quarter to participating domestic lounges in India.
Effective 1 April 2026, domestic lounge access is spend-gated: quarterly spends are tracked to unlock complimentary domestic access from the July 2026 quarter onwards.
Guest visits, and primary-cardholder visits beyond the complimentary quota, are charged up to USD 35 per visit.
international: 2 complimentary visits per calendar quarter to participating international lounges outside India via Priority Pass.
Guest visits, and visits beyond the 2-per-quarter complimentary quota, are charged up to USD 35 per visit.

joiningBenefits: Welcome vouchers worth Rs 50,000 on joining at a discounted fee of Rs 45,000
Alternative lower-fee joining path at Rs 5,000 with spend-based waiver and no welcome vouchers
4,000 bonus reward points on spends of Rs 5,00,000 or more within one year from card issue as per revised official note
additionalBenefits: Low forex markup of 1.8% on foreign currency transactions (not applicable for complimentary Pioneer Legacy card)
Complimentary golf privileges: 2 complimentary games and 2 complimentary lessons per month (effective 10 March 2026)
Buy 1 Get 1 free movie tickets on BookMyShow: up to 3 free tickets per month (capped at Rs 300 per ticket discount) plus Rs 50 off on F&B (applicable on the paid variant)
No cash advancement or withdrawal charges

salaried: Pioneer relationship and bank approval required
selfEmployed: Pioneer relationship and bank approval required

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-05-29

Lounge access conditions added 2026-06-07 from the official IndusInd domestic lounge program list (Pioneer Legacy is a participating card) and Priority Pass T&C: domestic spend-gating from the July 2026 quarter, 2 international visits per quarter via Priority Pass, USD 35 charge on guest and excess visits.
